homepage.text_excerpt:
Home - Q-Fin | Quality Finishing Solutions
Pushing
The Edge
Q-Fin develops, builds and supplies solutions for deburring, edge rounding and finishing metal sheet parts. Additionally, we ensure efficient handling, insights into performance and high reliability. Whatever it takes to get the maximal result.
Explore our solutions
Applications
Deburring
Edge rounding
Finishing
Handling
All applications
Deburring
Efficient deburring starts with the right solution. With the machines from Q-Fin, you remove burrs quickly and consistently, regardless of your application or material. You save time, improve the quality of your end product, and automate a process that is often time consuming.
The strength of Q-Fin lies in the combination of speed and reliability. The machines are designed to deliver top performance continuously with minimal setup time. This allows you to achieve maximum output without compromising on quality.
Read more
Edge rounding
Consistent edge rounding requires control and precision. With the machines from Q-Fin, you can effortlessly achieve a consistent edge rounding up to radius 3. This improves safety, ensures optimal coating adhesion, and enhances the overall appearance of your product.
What sets Q-Fin apart is its level of repeatability and control. You can easily set the desired radius and rely on uniform results, even in serial production. This turns edge rounding into a predictable and fully controlled process.
Read more
Finishing
High quality finishing requires flexibility and full control over the end result. With the machines from Q-Fin, you can easily achieve a wide range of finishes, from non directional finishing with the SER line to targeted roughness reduction, line finishing and polishing. This allows you to give every product exactly the appearance and quality it requires.
Q-Fin stands out through its versatility in finishing. One solution for multiple finishing techniques, without compromising on consistency. Whether you aim for functional roughness reduction or a visually refined result, you have full control over both the process and the final outcome.
Read more
Handling
Smart handling makes the difference in an efficient production process. With the automation solutions from Q-Fin, such as the Q-Bots and Q-Cell solutions, you can fully automate deburring and optimize all your internal logistics. From infeed and outfeed to switching between processes, everything runs seamlessly.
Q-Fin is leading the market when it comes to automation in the deburring industry. This lead is reflected in smart, practical solutions that perfectly fit your production process. By fully integrating handling and finishing, you reduce manual steps, prevent errors, and create a continuous and scalable workflow. This allows you to achieve maximum efficiency at every stage of your production.
Read more
All applications

about.text:
About Q-Fin - Q-Fin | Quality Finishing Solutions
Jump straight to:
Core values
History
Team
Certificates
About
Q-Fin
”PUSHING THE EDGE”
Q-Fin develops, builds, and supplies solutions for deburring, edge rounding, and finishing metal sheet parts. Additionally, we ensure efficient handling, insights in performance and high reliability. Whatever it takes to get the maximal result.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Watch video
At Q-Fin, we help organisations that want to make a lasting impression. Businesses who are ready to get started with their 4.0 version. Those who believe that simple production processes are not obstacles, but opportunities to distinguish themselves from the rest. Just as we also strive to stand out.
Contact us
Our
Core values
1. Pushing boundaries
Recognised as Europe’s Greatest
We help our clients make a difference
Machines with the highest output
Pushing boundaries together
Focus on profitability
Our machines are the new norm
2. Only for the best
With the best, for the best
For customers who want to make a difference
High-quality, aesthetic machinery
Further improving our machines, together
High-level customer experience
A reliable partner
3. Innovating together
Our knowledge becomes your advantage
Innovation is in our DNA
Operating outside of the box
Always looking for optimisations
Looking at the true needs within the market
One team in a modern working environment
The history of
Q-Fin
Step by step and year by year, our timeline has endured growth, from the first building, the first mission, to where we have reached today. Together, we continue to build a future filled with innovative solutions. On the timeline, you can not only see our history but also the expansion in terms of national, international, and the number of employees.
2013: Foundation of Q-Fin
Q-Fin B.V. was founded in 2013 by Anton Bax and Koen de Waard.
2014:  First national event fair
The first national trade show took place at Metavak in 2014, featuring the F200 machine.
2015: First international event fair
One year later, in 2015, we participated in Blechexpo, our first international trade show in Germany.
2017: New building
In July 2017, we moved to our new premises at Wilgenakker 8 in Bergeijk.
2017: New design
In addition to cutting-edge technology, we at Q-Fin also wanted to project this. Therefore, all of our automatic finish machines received a new design in 2017.
2018: Touchscreen
The new standard was set, with all our finishing machines equipped with a touch screen.
2019: 200 TopGrinders
Already 200 companies chose the comfort of the best hand-operated finishing machine in the world: the TopGrinder.
2019: Certified learning company
Q-Fin has always stood for innovation, including in the field of employees. This vision was further endorsed by the SBB, which recognized Q-Fin as an “Approved Training Company.
2020: First internal exhibition
The premiere of the first internal exhibition: the 4InnovatorsDays, where Q-Fin, together with a number of close relations, exhibited their companies.
2020: 25 employees
To sustain our growth, we have expanded once again to 25 employees.
2021: New corporate identity
In 2021, Q-Fin received a new corporate identity. Ready for the future.
2022: 35 employees
2022, a year in which we have welcomed many new employees to help Q-Fin grow a little more each day.
2023: PUSHING THE EDGE
PUSHING THE EDGE, our new slogan. Road to the future.
2024: 1000 TopGrinders
Five years after the sale of the 200th TopGrinder in 2024, 1,000 companies already chose the comfort of the best hand-operated finishing machine in the world.
2024: HMI Display
From now on, our new machines will be equipped with a large, modern touchscreen, which contributes to both appearance and user-friendliness.
2024: Introduction of EYE-Q
In 2024, we proudly introduced our unique EYE-Q principle: a revolutionary system that combines the power of vision, automation & intelligence for unmatched accuracy and efficiency in automated

Kontakt - Q-Fin | Quality Finishing Solutions
Kontakt
Wie können wir Ihnen helfen?
Bei Q-Fin sind wir immer erreichbar, um Ihre Fragen zu beantworten. Egal, ob Sie nach weiteren Informationen zu unseren Maschinen suchen, Hilfe bei einem Problem benötigen oder sogar auf der Suche nach einer interessanten Stelle in unserem Unternehmen sind, wir sind bereit, Sie zu unterstützen und die richtige Lösung anzubieten. Zögern Sie nicht, sich mit uns in Verbindung zu setzen, und wir helfen Ihnen gerne weiter.

Probleme mit Ihrer Maschine?
Trotz aller Sorgfalt kann es vorkommen, dass eine Maschine ausfällt. Keine Sorge – wir stehen bereit, um Ihnen sofort weiterzuhelfen.
